detail1: "Randomly obstructs everyone's screen with random ads. Click on them to destroy them. (Tap on mobile and press B on console)"
detail2: - Every 30 to 60 seconds hacker will spawn 5 notifications on your screen, blocking your vision.
detail3: - Hacker is client-sided, meaning it only appears on your client when it spawns.
detail4: - Hacker can only spawn after level 10.
detail5: - Hacker has a limit of 1 permanant Hacker, and has a hard cap of 1.
detail6: "Victim didn't click the pop-ups in time." "Victim forgot to click Hacker's pop-ups." "WE JUST WANT TO POP UP, Victim!.""You gotta click them, Victim." "Random decided to fire pop-ups at Victim and Victim didn't click them." "Victim was compromised." "I AM SCRIPT-KIDDY, I AM EVIL." "Try again." "Victim forgot about the Hacker curse."
